properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA secret used to sign and verify JWT access tokens. Must be at least 32 bytes when decoded. Override via JWT_SECRET env var in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.access-token-expiry-ms
properties.description: Access token validity in milliseconds. Default is 900000 (15 minutes).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Override via CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var.

properties.name: app.oauth2.redirect-uri
properties.description: Frontend URI that the backend redirects to after a successful OAuth2 login, appending ?token=<accessToken>. Override via OAUTH2_REDIRECT_URI env var.

properties.name: app.turn.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP of the coturn TURN server used for WebRTC NAT traversal.

properties.name: app.turn.port
properties.description: UDP/TCP port of the coturn TURN server. Default is 3478.

properties.name: app.turn.secret
properties.description: Shared secret used to generate HMAC-SHA1 coturn time-limited credentials.

properties.name: app.turn.ttl-seconds
properties.description: Validity period in seconds for TURN credentials issued to clients. Default is 86400 (24 hours).
